ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: !$Setup.CS001_NeutraliserRegles__c.TECH_NeutraliserRegleValidation__c && ( ISPICKVAL ( Approbateur_1__r.UserType, 'CspLitePortal' ) || ISPICKVAL ( Approbateur_2__r.UserType, 'CspLitePortal' ) || ISPICKVAL ( Approbateur_3__r.UserType, 'CspLitePortal' ) || ISPICKVAL ( Approbateur_4__r.UserType, 'CspLitePortal' ) || ISPICKVAL ( Approbateur_5__r.UserType, 'CspLitePortal' ) || ISPICKVAL ( Approbateur_6__r.UserType, 'CspLitePortal' ) || ISPICKVAL ( Approbateur_7__r.UserType, 'CspLitePortal' ) || ISPICKVAL ( Approbateur_8__r.UserType, 'CspLitePortal' ) || ISPICKVAL ( Approbateur_9__r.UserType, 'CspLitePortal' ) || ISPICKVAL ( Approbateur_10__r.UserType, 'CspLitePortal' ) || ISPICKVAL ( Approbateur_11__r.UserType, 'CspLitePortal' ) || ISPICKVAL ( Approbateur_12__r.UserType, 'CspLitePortal' ) || ISPICKVAL ( ChefEquipe1__r.UserType, 'CspLitePortal' ) || ISPICKVAL ( ChefEquipe2__r.UserType, 'CspLitePortal' ) || ISPICKVAL ( ChefEquipe3__r.UserType, 'CspLitePortal' ) || ISPICKVAL ( ChefEquipe4__r.UserType, 'CspLitePortal' ) || ISPICKVAL ( ChefEquipe5__r.UserType, 'CspLitePortal' ) || ISPICKVAL ( ChefEquipe6__r.UserType, 'CspLitePortal' ) || ISPICKVAL ( ChefEquipe7__r.UserType, 'CspLitePortal' ) || ISPICKVAL ( Responsable_agence__r.UserType, 'CspLitePortal' ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Seuls les utilisateurs internes sont autorisés sur les champs "Responsable d'agence", "Chef d'équipe" et "Approbateur".
